name: The Great Couturier
short_description: A multiplayer fashion roguelike! In each round, choose new upgrades for your outfit from random options and rate the looks of other players. Only the best of the best will become Great Couturiers!
detailed_description:
Choose a model and guide her on a journey from simple basics to the most expensive outfits imaginable. At every step of the way, you will vote for other players, and every step you take will be judged by them.

If your taste is impeccable, you will earn extra coins for your model. But a true master must be able to work with both modest beginnings and luxurious masterpieces.

Style can only be truly appreciated by others, so we have taken every measure to ensure a fair and convenient judging system:

  • 100% Multiplayer: All ratings are given by real players! They are incentivized to rate carefully and honestly.

  • Unified Community: The game features a multiplayer Demo that anyone can play for free. Players from the Demo and the Full Version can vote for each other and even compete in the same contests.

Fair Matchmaking: Don't worry about balance - you will only be paired with players of a similar rating and at the same stage of the game. No one will be asked to choose between a Demo player in an early round and a Full Version player with a complete, high-end outfit.

By combining player pools, we ensure active voting and support both the Demo and the Paid version of the game, all while avoiding the "Free to Play" mechanics we wanted to stay away from.

Whether you try the Demo or the Full Version, we look forward to seeing you join other fashion lovers in this compact yet highly replayable game about style.

supported_languages:
English*, French*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Portuguese - Portugal*, Russian*, Simplified Chinese*
*languages with full audio support
